elements.text: You wake up and realize that you're late for your first online class of the day. You log into the meeting and when you do, your teacher stops talking. You apologize for being late in the chat, and spend the rest of the class feeling...

elements.name: running_late--academics_work_career_development--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
